case_title: DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS VS GIANNIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $749.87 FILED BY DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT GIANNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
